title: Torch's Dark Aesthetics
description: A dark mode resource pack that is designed to give a simple and more visible feel to the Minecraft GUI.
body:
# Torch's Dark Aesthetics
Makes Minecraft's interface fit a darker aesthetic while also making it more squared off and visible. All textures were handmade by me. The idea for this pack was to make a simple GUI pack that I could work off of for a mod based resource pack that wouldn't be complicated to work with. With my pack, due to me simplifying the shapes of the GUI's by squaring them off, it not only makes it have a bit more visibility, it also for allows easier edits to a mod's textures to match this simplicity. In the future, there will be "[Color] Aesthetic" versions of this pack as well, changing small things like the player background or progress bars to match a certain color.

Mod Support can be found here: 

[![Modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3.2.0/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/torchsdarkaesthesticsmodded)

## Important Information
The translucent textures in this resource pack on MC Version 1.21.1 will not work without a mod like [Neo TranslucencyFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/neo-translucencyfix). 

## Recommended Mods
- **[Neo TranslucencyFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/neo-translucencyfix)**: Makes translucent textures ACTUALLY translucent. (not needed if on version 1.21.2 or above)
- **[TranslucencyFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/translucencyfix)**: Makes translucent textures ACTUALLY translucent. (needed if on version 1.20.1 or below)
- **[Raised](https://modrinth.com/mod/raised) Mod**: Moves the hotbar so it doesn't crop the texture.
